best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-firebase-002 title: verify data retrieval from firebase realtime database module: firebase source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in and has valid credentials. test data: sample data previously stored in the database. test steps: 1. user logs into the application. 2. data organizer requests data from firebase. 3. firebase retrieves the data from the realtime database. 4. firebase authenticates the user. 5. firebase returns the data to the data organizer. expected result: data is successfully retrieved from the realtime database.

test case id: tc-chat-001 title: verify user interaction in chat system module: chat source pages: 2 preconditions: two users are registered and logged in. test data: sample message content. test steps: 1. user1 logs into the application. 2. user1 creates a chat with user2. 3. user1 sends a message to user2. 4. user2 receives the message. 5. user2 sends a response message to user1. 6. user1 receives the response message. expected result: messages are successfully sent and received between user1 and user2.
